source_pr.title: executor: add correctness tests about direct reading with indexJoin
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: related #24150 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

executor: add correctness tests about direct reading with indexJoin

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Add some correctness tests about partition table direct reading functors when they become the inner side of the join functor.

How it Works:

N/A

Side effects

- N/A
